productName: Micro Cart - 1g Cartridge - Micro Cart - Strawberry Mochi - 1g
description: This hybrid cartridge loads Strawberry Mochi into a sleek 510-thread pen for clean, convenient draws — premium oil, precise hits, zero hassle. Flavor on the go, with notes of honey, strawberry, and vanilla, leading into an even, best-of-both-worlds feel.
